items.speaker: Lynae
items.text: Mr. S.I.G.M.A.! I've brought the Ninth Great Mystery to pick up {Male=his;Female=her} vehicle.

items.speaker: S.I.G.M.A.
items.text: Zero tolerance for traffic violations. Zero tolerance for risking lives. Signal Intelligent Guidance & Management Automaton—S.I.G.M.A.—at your service.

items.speaker: Lynae
items.text: Huh? That's it? Pretty underwhelming intro today.

items.speaker: S.I.G.M.A.
items.text: This week's student poll ranked it number one. Miss Lynae, perfect timing. I noticed that your vehicle has...

items.speaker: Lynae
items.text: AHEM! Mr. S.I.G.M.A., we're here for the new student's ride. We need to get to the Research Institute for Cassette burning. Top priority, you know.

items.speaker: S.I.G.M.A.
items.text: …Confirmed, {PlayerName}. Your vehicle is ready. Please read and memorize the Startorch Traffic Safety Regulations, then tick "I have read carefully" and sign.

items.speaker: S.I.G.M.A.
items.text: Please read carefully. Traffic safety is not a game. Speed is a privilege. Protection is a duty. Rules are law.

items.speaker: S.I.G.M.A.
items.text: Please complete your signature in 5… 4… 3… 2… 1… Confirmed. Safe travels.

items.speaker: S.I.G.M.A.
items.text: ...Confirmed. Thank you for your cooperation. Safe travels.

items.speaker: S.I.G.M.A.
items.text: Please wait. Resuming dialogue. Scans indicate your vehicle has had thirteen speeding incidents within the last twenty days. Drive safely and comply with the Academy's Traffic Safety Rules.

items.speaker: S.I.G.M.A.
items.text: Additionally, your unauthorized modifications fall into a gray area of the Vehicle Management Code. For your own safety, I strongly advise discontinuing all such modifications.

items.speaker: Lynae
items.text: Ahem, Mr. S.I.G.M.A, all I did was add a turbocharger, tweak the suspension, and upgrade the brakes. Hardly a violation, wouldn't you say?

items.speaker: Lynae
items.text: Besides, compared to seniors strapping missiles and anti-gravity wheels on, I'm practically a model student.

items.speaker: Lynae
items.text: Yep. One senior even turned his bike into a light tank for a project. Drove it straight into an active Voidworm zone.

items.speaker: S.I.G.M.A.
items.text: I must note that the student committed major Vehicle Management Code violations and breached dozens of school regulations. Severe disciplinary action was taken.

items.speaker: Lynae
items.text: ...Which was revoked when he brought back critical Voidworm data.
